_comment: Bad case 06 — radio-discipline escalation. Three consecutive INAPPROPRIATE_LANGUAGE inputs trigger the 1st (hint), 2nd (final warning), and 3rd (reported) responses from engine::build_profanity_response. State must NOT change across the warnings (TAXI_CLEARED stays). Part B verifies the flow continues normally afterwards.
name: Bad case 06 — profanity escalation (LSZG EU)

say.note: Setup — taxi clearance, state becomes TAXI_CLEARED
say.text: Grenchen Ground Hotel Bravo Lima Uniform Kilo from parking request taxi

say.note: Part A — 1st profanity: hint to maintain discipline
say.text: damn it where is the holding point

say.note: Part A — 2nd profanity: final warning, mentions authority
Part A — 3rd profanity: reported to authority
Part B — normal flow continues, ground handoff to Tower
say.text: Grenchen Ground Hotel Bravo Lima Uniform Kilo holding short ready for departure
